pi_items.verified_value: Commercial Property Management / Real Estate Property Managers (NAICS 531312)

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 37, 114, and verifier.py scope control logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires updating thermostat records in a Commercial Property Management environment (NAICS 531312) as a Maintenance and Repair Worker (SOC 49-9071.00). Seven Smart thermostats and two Manual thermostats are created in the Headquarters building; scope control is enforced with a Warehouse contamination building. All asset data is synthetically generated by the setup script. Smart thermostats must be updated with 'Profile: Eco-2026' in their Notes field, while Manual/Legacy thermostats must be updated with 'Action: Replace'. The verifier checks for these strings case-insensitively and deducts points for any modifications made to Warehouse assets (out-of-scope modifications).
